tasks.title: Edit change-validator.md to audit TDD evidence and emit ## TDD Evidence Audit section

subtasks.title: Append ## TDD Evidence Audit AFTER ## Gates with `Check | Result | Details` summary table using fixed check-name set
Inline cross-consistency checks (cross-ref, no-duplicate, no-extra, section-present, cell-count) parsing only the `- <sha> — task <id>: <summary>` prefix
subtasks.scenario: completed task with no commit line

subtasks.title: Mirror column grammar from implementor prompt (Layer enum, RED literal, GREEN literal, Triangulation regex, Safety net regex, Refactor two-value set, behavior-without-test, cell-count)

Inline severity mapping as policy authority: CRITICAL for RED/GREEN/safety-net/behavior-without-test/missing-row/duplicate/extra/orphan-commit/orphan-task/gate-on-row-owned-file; WARNING for Refactor off-grammar, Layer off-enum, gate on non-row-owned file
Mirror every fail/warn audit row into ## Findings under matching severity; keep ## Verdict / critical as routing authority
Instruct textual-only audit posture: run gates literally from CODING_STANDARDS.md with no hardcoded commands, no git history, no commit diffs, no test-source inspection
End section with self-checklist tail enumerating all check names so a missing step is visible in the validator output
Inline note that orchestrator owns skill injection and the implementor must not duplicate it
subtasks.scenario: no skill-load prose in implementor prompt

tasks.title: Edit change-implementor.md to emit canonical commits and TDD evidence rows

subtasks.title: Replace ## Commits line template with `- <sha> — task <id>: <summary>` and note legacy `; tests:` suffix is harmless noise
Inline `## TDD Evidence` table with exact header `Task | Commit | Non-test files | Test files | Layer | Safety net | RED | GREEN | Triangulation | Refactor`
Inline per-column value grammar verbatim with settled two-value Refactor set {clean, none needed} and no-pipe rule
subtasks.scenario: all ten cells present on a clean task

subtasks.title: Add loop instruction to append one matching evidence row immediately after every task-done + commit step before advancing
Keep ## Remaining and result envelope byte-identical; stay silent on TDD skill loading
subtasks.scenario: no skill-load prose in implementor prompt

tasks.title: Run regression gates and verify envelope labels survive the prompt edits

subtasks.title: Run `uv run pytest tests/test_renderers.py` and confirm envelope field labels (partial:, changed_files:, remaining_tasks:, verdict:, critical:) and shared envelope shape still pass

Confirm no new files were added under src/ai_harness/modules/harness/, no new test file, no new CLI subcommand
